meaning: n.[建] 柱子,栋梁,重要的支持者
examples: My father is a pillar of the community.
The pillar obstructed our view of the stage.
John put on his harness and attached it to a pillar.
And that third pillar, Otellini believes, will be best implemented in silicon, not software.
The truth is that strong performance is only one pillar of an effective marketing strategy.
